title: Update containers/storage to pick up overlay driver fix
body:
New pinned commit is ff8a6d2bf496daf46ab1a153f783a0f6b8762a54

This includes a fix to error reporting with overlayfs, and will produce more verbose errors when initializing overlayfs fails.

comments.body: @baude Looks like the c/storage update is breaking the image tests? Maybe a behavior change in how images are removed?
Rebased on top of #543 which should fix the issue
LGTM, good to hear that it was a relatively simple rebase  fix.

:pushpin: Commit 791362e has been approved by `baude`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=baude 791362ec53ac20b7ac9d752018be7d69aff4bd50 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
